_meta.purpose: Service-specific sentences in Hinglish for 32 pearls dental world. {{service}} placeholder replaced by engine with actual treatment name.
rules: Mention outcomes, pain levels, improvement naturally
Dental anxiety before + relief after is the core emotion
Mix 'meri problem thi' style with 'treatment hua' style
Keep it like telling a friend, not a clinical report

5star: {{service}} ke liye aaya tha aur honestly bilkul dard nahi hua.
Meri {{service}} ki problem kaafi purani thi, yahan se finally kuch fark pada.
{{service}} yahan bahut carefully kiya jaata hai — pata hi nahi chala kab ho gaya.
Pehle {{service}} ke naam se hi ghabra jaata tha, yahan itna smooth hua.
{{service}} ke liye Kanpur mein itna accha option nahi tha, yahan mil gaya.
Sirf ek hi session mein {{service}} complete ho gaya, unexpected tha.
{{service}} ka treatment plan yahan jo bataya gaya wo actually logical tha.
{{service}} ki wajah se bahut pareshan tha, ab kaafi better feel ho raha hai.
Specifically {{service}} ke liye aaya tha aur bahut khush hoon result se.
{{service}} yahan modern technique se kiya — bilkul alag experience tha.
{{service}} ke baare mein itna dara hua tha — unnecessary nikla woh darr.
{{service}} ke liye teen jagah gaya pehle — yahan aake finally sahi jagah mili.
4star: {{service}} ke liye aaya tha, treatment theek chal raha hai.
Meri {{service}} ki problem dheere dheere improve ho rahi hai.
{{service}} ke results aa rahe hain, satisfied hoon abhi tak.
